title: Claim pending for over 30 days – no updates
summary: Employee claim has been pending for 30+ days with no status update from TPA. Client HR escalating internally.
rawMessage: Dear Avik, We have 3 pending claims that have crossed the 30-day mark. Despite multiple follow-ups, we haven't received any updates. Our employees are getting frustrated.

title: Urgent: Employee hospitalization claim stuck in processing
summary: Hospitalized employee's cashless claim stuck at TPA level. Hospital threatening to convert to cash payment.
rawMessage: Hi team, URGENT - Our employee is currently admitted at Apollo Hospital. The cashless request was sent 48 hours ago but no approval yet.

title: Multiple claims delayed beyond TAT – account at risk
summary: Multiple claims from this account are past SLA. Client is a key account and threatening to not renew policy.
rawMessage: Avik, This is unacceptable. We've had 3 claims stuck for weeks now. If this isn't resolved by EOW, we'll reconsider our partnership.

title: Cashless claim approval delayed – patient still admitted
summary: Cashless approval for surgery pending 48hrs. Hospital needs confirmation today.
rawMessage: Dear All, Employee surgery was scheduled yesterday. Cashless still not approved. Hospital is asking the patient to arrange funds.

title: Reimbursement claim pending since 3 weeks
summary: Reimbursement submitted 3 weeks ago. All documents verified but payment not processed.
rawMessage: Hi Mr Avik, My reimbursement claim was submitted on Feb 5th with all required documents. It's been 3 weeks and still Under Review.

title: Claim rejected due to documentation – client disputing
summary: Claim rejected for insufficient documentation but client says all docs were submitted via portal.
rawMessage: We uploaded all documents through the portal. The rejection saying documents missing is incorrect. Please investigate.

title: Pre-existing condition rejection – needs review
summary: Claim denied citing pre-existing condition. Employee joined policy 2 years ago with no exclusion clause.
rawMessage: The employee disclosed no pre-existing conditions at enrollment and the 2-year waiting period has passed. This rejection needs reconsideration.

title: Daycare claim rejected – valid procedure per policy
summary: Daycare procedure claim rejected but procedure is listed in the policy schedule. Needs TPA correction.
rawMessage: The daycare procedure is clearly listed in our policy schedule as a covered benefit. The rejection is incorrect.

title: Policy document not received after payment
summary: Payment made 10 days ago but policy document still not issued. Client needs it for compliance audit.
rawMessage: We made payment on 20/02/2026 to add an employee. As per your process it takes 3-5 working days which has elapsed. Still following up.

title: Incorrect policy details – wrong member count
summary: Policy issued with incorrect member count. Multiple employees currently without coverage.
rawMessage: The policy we received has incorrect member data. We submitted 200 members but only 150 are listed. 50 employees have no coverage.

title: Onboarding data errors – all info incorrect
summary: All information provided during onboarding is incorrect. Entire onboarding needs to restart.
rawMessage: All the information provided are incorrect from premium to EIDs. Dashboard was set up but data is wrong. Onboarding needs to restart.

title: Employee app access not working after onboarding
summary: Employees completed onboarding but cannot login to the Plum app. Support tickets unanswered.
rawMessage: None of our employees can login to the Plum app since onboarding last week. We've raised 3 support tickets with no response.

title: Health IDs not issued – employees can't access cashless
summary: Health IDs pending for 20+ employees since onboarding. They cannot avail cashless hospitalization.
rawMessage: Over twenty emails regarding Health IDs went unanswered. The delay directly caused cashless processing issues during an emergency.

title: Claims portal down – unable to submit documents
summary: Claims upload portal returning errors. Client unable to submit claim documents.
rawMessage: We are effectively fighting to submit documents to your platform. The portal rejects every file format we try.

title: Cashless denied at hospital despite active policy
summary: Employee's cashless claim denied at network hospital. Employee had to pay from pocket.
rawMessage: The entire process from admission to securing cashless was unnecessarily complicated due to non-issuance of Health ID.

title: Emergency cashless not processed – patient paying from pocket
summary: Emergency admission – cashless request submitted but no response for 24hrs. Family paying from savings.
rawMessage: My team member was rushed to hospital last night. Cashless request submitted immediately but 24 hours later no response.

title: Reimbursement pending 45 days – way beyond SLA
summary: Reimbursement claim approved 45 days ago but payment still not received. Employee threatening legal action.
rawMessage: It has been 45 days since my claim was approved. Your SLA says 15 working days. I will take legal action if payment is not made.

title: Premium invoice doesn't match agreed rates
summary: Latest premium invoice shows rates higher than the signed agreement. Client refusing to pay.
rawMessage: On SF - GWP for all products sold should be 153991+GST. Its updated as 1,50,000+GST. Please make the changes.

title: New joiner endorsements pending for 3 weeks
summary: New joiner endorsements submitted 3 weeks ago. None processed. Employees have no coverage.
rawMessage: We submitted endorsement for 15 new joiners 3 weeks ago. None have coverage. If anyone gets hospitalized, who is responsible?

title: Renewal quote not received – policy expiring in 5 days
summary: Policy expires in 5 days. Renewal quote requested 3 weeks ago but not yet received.
rawMessage: Our policy expires on March 25th. We asked for renewal quote 3 weeks ago. Still nothing. Gap in coverage is a compliance issue.

title: Unprofessional behavior from support staff
summary: Client's HR reports rude behavior from support agent. Formal complaint filed.
rawMessage: In an urgent situation, my team was informed 'I am from the onboarding team, can't help you much.' This is unacceptable.

title: No response from relationship manager for 2 weeks
summary: Relationship manager hasn't responded for 2 weeks. Client feels abandoned. Enterprise account.
rawMessage: I have not heard from our relationship manager in 2 weeks. Emails, calls, messages all unanswered.

title: Dedicated training session needed for employees
summary: Client wants dedicated training session for employees. Common sessions not sufficient.
rawMessage: I requested a dedicated training session. The common Thursday session was not engaging. Please arrange proper training.

title: Wrong premium data in Salesforce
summary: Salesforce shows incorrect GWP data. Needs correction before quarter close.
rawMessage: On SF - GWP (Exc GST) for all products sold should be 153991+GST. Please make the changes on SF for GMC & GPA opp.

title: Hospital removed from network without notification
summary: Hospital removed from network without notification. Client's employees have no nearby alternative.
rawMessage: Fortis in our area was removed from the network without telling us! Employees found out when they went for treatment.

title: TPA not responding to hospital queries
summary: TPA not responding to hospital pre-auth queries. Multiple cashless requests stuck.
rawMessage: The hospital says Plum's TPA hasn't responded to queries for 3 days. They're thinking of dropping Plum from network.

title: Document upload portal not accepting files
summary: Portal rejecting document uploads with format errors. Claims getting delayed.
rawMessage: We are required to upload documents one by one through a complex portal. After completing the upload, your website failed.

title: Invoice not received for 2 months
summary: Client hasn't received invoices for 2 months. Accounts team can't process payment.
rawMessage: We haven't received invoices for January and February. Our accounts team cannot process payment without proper invoices.

title: Maternity coverage clarification needed urgently
summary: Employee's maternity claim denied. HR thought maternity was covered. Needs urgent clarification.
rawMessage: One of our employees was told maternity isn't covered. We were under the impression it is. Please clarify.

title: Referral request for brother's company
summary: Existing client referring brother's company for insurance. Sales lead, not an escalation.
rawMessage: Hi Avik, My brother is looking for insurance for his firm. Can you reach out to him? Regards.
